# Domain model index

<!-- GENERATED by cmd/model-index — do not edit by hand. Everything here is derived by inspecting the model stubs (imports and the types implementing simulator.Iteration). Regenerate with `go run ./cmd/model-index`. -->

_This page is generated by `cmd/model-index` from the model stubs — it is the checkable form of the generality claim (one engine, many domains) and the surface on which the extension-promotion signal becomes visible. `TestModelIndexUpToDate` fails CI if it drifts from the code._

## Models

| Model | Core packages | Bespoke iterations | Behaviour-bound |
|---|---|---|---|
| `anglersim` | `pkg/simulator` | 2: `ClimateCovariatesIteration`, `RickerIteration` | ✓ |
| `antimicrobial-resistance` | `pkg/simulator` | 2: `ColonisationDynamicsIteration`, `InfectionProcessIteration` | ✓ |
| `bathing-water-forecaster` | `pkg/continuous`, `pkg/simulator` | 1: `BathingConcentrationIteration` | ✓ |
| `business-survival` | `pkg/simulator` | 1: `SingleLAPopulationIteration` | ✓ |
| `energy-balancer` | `pkg/continuous`, `pkg/simulator` | 8: `BatteryDegradationIteration`, `BatteryIteration`, `CarbonIntensityIteration`, `CarbonSavingsIteration`, `CarbonThresholdDispatchIteration`, `ImbalancePriceIteration`, `PriceThresholdDispatchIteration`, `RevenueIteration` | ✓ |
| `floodrisk` | `pkg/simulator` | 2: `RainfallRunoffIteration`, `StochasticRainfallIteration` | ✓ |
| `homark` | `pkg/continuous`, `pkg/general`, `pkg/simulator` | 2: `AffordabilityFromLogsIteration`, `StochasticPipelineIteration` | ✓ |
| `measles-risk-forecaster` | `pkg/simulator` | 2: `JointOutbreakIteration`, `NationalImportationIteration` | ✓ |
| `trywizard` | `pkg/discrete`, `pkg/general`, `pkg/simulator` | 1: `ConversionIteration` | ✓ |

## Core-package reuse

How many models build on each engine package — the concrete reuse behind the generality claim.

| Core package | Models |
|---|---|
| `pkg/simulator` | 9 — anglersim, antimicrobial-resistance, bathing-water-forecaster, business-survival, energy-balancer, floodrisk, homark, measles-risk-forecaster, trywizard |
| `pkg/continuous` | 3 — bathing-water-forecaster, energy-balancer, homark |
| `pkg/general` | 2 — homark, trywizard |
| `pkg/discrete` | 1 — trywizard |

## Promotion signal

Name tokens shared by bespoke iterations across more than one model — a best-effort hint for the maintainer to judge, not an automatic promotion:

| Shared token | Models |
|---|---|
| `stochastic` | floodrisk, homark |
